author: crispypata
title: Checking if the cachebusting technique works for the catalog
content:
One thing i noticed when i uploaded the assets to neocities is that the contents of the main page did not change because the browser fetched from the cached version of the json

I was looking across some site from neocities and came across this site. I learned that if you can bust a cache by adding a query with time for fetching assets.

Let's see if the shell is able to fetch the latest version of the catalog without manually reloading cache.

I added a time query for any fetch requests just to see if the cache busting works as intended
